title: Berbere Stew
description: A flavorful and spicy stew inspired by Ethiopian cuisine. Berbere is a staple spice blend in Ethiopian cooking.

ingredients.name: Stew tomatoes (or 2 cups chopped fresh tomatoes)

instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
2. Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Stir in Berbere spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
5. Add carrots and potato, and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Add tomato paste, stew tomatoes, vegetable broth, water, salt, and black pepper.
7. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
